blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 47 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
